title: Plan checklist
detail: Identified 3 checklist items requiring lookup, computation, and judgment strategies.

items.question: What is the FY2018 capital expenditure amount (in USD millions) for 3M?
What was 3M's fixed asset turnover ratio in FY2018?
What is 3M's FY2023 capital expenditure guidance?

title: Identify required inputs
detail: This is a direct lookup: FY2018 capital expenditures from the cash flow statement.

title: Search cash flow statement
detail: Retrieved top passages for capital expenditures.

payload.query: capital expenditures purchases of property plant and equipment 2018

chunks.snippet: Purchases of property, plant and equipment (PP&E) ... 1,577 1,373 1,420
Capital spending is expected to support ongoing manufacturing capacity.

title: get_pages
detail: Fetching page 45 of 3M_2018_10K to confirm the exact figure.

title: get_pages result
detail: Page 45 text returned.

output.excerpt: Purchases of property, plant and equipment (PP&E) 1,577 1,373 1,420

title: Cite cash flow statement
detail: Capex line item located in the consolidated statement of cash flows.

payload.quote: Purchases of property, plant and equipment (PP&E) 1,577

title: Answer recorded
detail: Direct lookup answer recorded with one grounded citation.

citations.quote: Purchases of property, plant and equipment (PP&E) 1,577

title: Identify required inputs
detail: Fixed asset turnover requires FY2018 net sales and average net PP&E across FY2018 and FY2017.

title: Search income statement
detail: Retrieved net sales figures.

title: Cite net sales
detail: Net sales line item located in the consolidated statement of income.

title: Search balance sheet
detail: Retrieved net PP&E for FY2018 and FY2017.

title: Cite net PP&E
detail: Net PP&E line item located on the consolidated balance sheet.

payload.claim: Net PP&E was $8,738 million (FY2018) and $8,689 million (FY2017).

title: calculate
detail: Computing fixed asset turnover as net sales divided by average net PP&E.

title: calculate result
detail: Fixed asset turnover computed as 3.76x.

title: Use average PP&E convention
detail: Applied the average of FY2018 and FY2017 net PP&E, a standard fixed-asset-turnover convention, since the question does not specify point-in-time vs. average.

payload.text: Used average of period-start and period-end net PP&E per standard fixed asset turnover convention.

title: Answer recorded
detail: Computed answer recorded with two grounded inputs.

payload.answer: 3M's FY2018 fixed asset turnover ratio was approximately 3.76x, computed as net sales divided by average net PP&E.

citations.claim: Net PP&E was $8,738 million (FY2018) and $8,689 million (FY2017).

title: Identify required inputs
detail: This item asks for FY2023 capex guidance, which would require forward-looking disclosures not present in a FY2018 10-K.

title: Search for forward guidance
detail: Searched the filing for capital expenditure guidance or outlook language.

chunks.snippet: We do not provide specific capital expenditure guidance beyond the current fiscal year.

title: No forward-looking data available
detail: The FY2018 10-K contains no FY2023 capex guidance; fabricating a figure would be ungrounded.

payload.text: No FY2023 capital expenditure guidance is present in the retrieved filing.

title: Abstained
detail: Abstained due to absence of grounding evidence.

payload.answer: Cannot be answered from the available FY2018 10-K filing; no FY2023 capital expenditure guidance is disclosed.

title: Run complete
detail: 2 of 3 items answered with grounded citations; 1 abstained due to missing forward-looking data.
